title: FluXTape Interaction Event Schema
description: Schema for all interaction events captured by the participatory version system. Each participant session produces one JSON file containing a list of events in this format.

session_envelope.description: The top-level object written to storage at session close.

fields.song_id: Identifier for the song being listened to
fields.event_count: Total number of events in this session
fields.events: Ordered array of Event objects (see below)

session_start.description: Fired when a participant begins a listening session.

play.description: Fired when playback begins or resumes.

pause.description: Fired when the listener pauses playback.

seek.description: Fired when the listener navigates to a different position in the track.

feature_switch.description: THE PRIMARY EVENT. Fired every time a listener changes a musical dimension. This is the core behavioural data for preference analysis.

fields.dimension: Which parameter was changed: lyrics | groove | solo | spatial | backing_vocals
fields.playback_pos_s: Track position at the moment of switch (seconds)

skip.description: Fired when the listener exits a version before completion (defined as < 30 s of playback in study protocol).

fields.skip_at_s: How far into the track playback reached before skip

complete.description: Fired when a version plays to its end without interruption.

save.description: Fired when a listener bookmarks a version.

fields.during_playback: Boolean — true if saved while track was playing

rating.description: Fired when a listener submits a post-listening scale rating.

fields.scale: Name of the rating scale: enjoyment | emotional_intensity | coherence | preference_rank

session_end.description: Fired at session close. Includes the final configuration snapshot and total switch count — the primary summary record.

fields.final_config: Dict of {dimension: value} at close — the configuration the listener settled on
fields.total_switches: Total number of feature_switch events in the session

derived_variables.description: Variables computed from raw events for statistical analysis. See SessionLogger.derive_summary().

variables.n_switches_total: Total feature_switch events across all dimensions
variables.first_dim_touched: The first dimension the listener interacted with
variables.time_in_config_s: Approximate seconds spent in each configuration (dict)
